productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Solid Blue Track Pants
description: CompositionBlue track pants made of 100% cotton, has a broad elasticated waist with drawstrings, reinforced stitching along the crotch area, and two pockets on the sides with brand embroidery above the left pocketFittingSlimWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeReturn to holistic living in style with these track pants from urban yoga. Designed for comfort with sweat-absorbent fabric, these tracks allow you to concentrate on the task at hand with much ease. The fabric allows you to stretch with ease, while the reinforced tear points ensure that your slacks last longer, and the flat seams around the waist and sides prevent irritation.
